name: Shitake-Nettle-Tofu Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried shitake mushrooms in warm water.
2. Rinse the nettle tops and cook them in enough water to cover until tender.
3. Drain the nettles immediately.
4. Sauté the onion (and garlic, if desired) in half of the olive oil until partially soft.
5. Slice the softened shitake mushrooms and sauté with the onion for 3 minutes.
6. Cut the tofu into small cubes and sauté with the remaining oil and onion for 4 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and stir in the cooked nettle tops.
8. Arrange in pre-baked crusts.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 40-50 minutes, or until the center is set.
10. Decorate with sprigs of nettles and fresh spring flowers before serving.
